title: Additional Transfurs
description: Some additional transfurs to changed minecraft mod.
body:
Additional transfurs is a mod about adding a few simple transfurs to Changed Minecraft Mod, as well as serve as a part of a modular addon system, allowing users to choose which themes they want without having to include potentially unwanted features (For example, you might want to include AT, because you like more transfurs, but adding Untransfur seems redundant because you already have Changed Addon in your modpack).

Currently, the mod is in early beta, and only includes 2 transfurs: Latex Fox, and Latex Plant Dragon. This will change as I update the mod, but I wanted to release the mod earlier, to collect suggestions on what could be added.

Our discord: https://discord.gg/n3w6tWe6ek
